message:
Add authenticated API client for CLI

Implements packages/cli/src/lib/api-client.ts with:
- ApiClient class for making authenticated requests
- Automatic Bearer token injection from credentials module
- Request methods: request, get, post, put, delete
- Timeout handling with AbortController
- Error parsing from JSON responses
- Helper functions: isAuthError, isPermissionError, isNotFoundError, requiresPremium
- Default client instance export (apiClient)
- Uses JFP_PREMIUM_API_URL env var with fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
